_comment: Tailscale Serve + Funnel config. Reverse-proxies all incoming HTTPS on port 443 → backend container :6823. ${TS_CERT_DOMAIN} resolves to the actual <hostname>.<tailnet>.ts.net domain at runtime — DO NOT hard-code it. AllowFunnel=true is what makes the URL publicly reachable from the internet (not just the tailnet).
